overall.description: A ship bridge simulation showing a cargo vessel navigating through rough, stormy seas at dusk. The view includes working navigation monitors displaying radar and charts, with a temporary fog bank or wave splash briefly obscuring visibility around the 3-4 second mark.

scene_state.functional_zone: ship bridge with forward deck observation

events.description: heavy sea spray or fog bank engulfs the bow, severely reducing forward visibility

agents.ego_description: operating the cargo vessel from the bridge, monitoring radar and navigation systems while proceeding through rough seas

entered.detail: digital chart display showing coastal map with vessel position
circular radar screen with rotating sweep showing nearby contacts
blue screen displaying depth or sonar information
metal deck of the cargo ship with railings and hatches
rough choppy sea with visible wave patterns
dense white fog or sea spray obscuring the horizon

segments.scene_description: View from a cargo ship's bridge showing navigation monitors and the forward deck. The ship moves steadily through rough seas. Around 3.5 seconds, heavy sea spray or fog suddenly engulfs the bow, reducing visibility.

scene_state.functional_zone: ship bridge with forward deck observation

events.description: sea spray dissipates and forward visibility returns to normal

agents.ego_description: continuing to navigate the vessel through rough seas with clear visibility restored

segments.scene_description: The view clears as the sea spray dissipates. The ship continues moving forward through the rough ocean, with all navigation monitors active and the radar continuously rotating.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous view from a cargo ship's bridge as it navigates rough seas, transitioning from clear visibility to a sudden whiteout and back again. It begins with a steady forward gaze over the bow and active navigation monitors, while the vessel pushes through churning ocean waters. As the ship advances, a heavy wall of sea spray and fog suddenly engulfs the forward deck, momentarily obscuring the horizon in a dense white haze. The scene then clears as the spray dissipates, revealing the open ocean once more while the radar continues its rhythmic rotation on the monitors. The camera remains fixed on the forward trajectory, maintaining a steady course through the stormy environment.
